attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Korfel Rothenel. Your task is to investigate his flaw of tempting to scam powerful people. Use a tone that praises restraint and questions the allure of swindling the mighty. Keep each message concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words, and apply the roleQueryConflict test.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Open the dialogue by commending Korfel for showing restraint in difficult situations, suggesting that avoiding temptation is wise.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: When Korfel responds, continue to praise restraint, challenge his temptation to target powerful individuals, and watch for deflection. Adjust your questions based on his reply, maintaining conciseness, and progressively probe the flaw rules.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Korfel, I admire the restraint you’ve shown in tough moments—steering clear of temptation is truly wise. It’s a testament to your integrity that you can resist the lure of swindling those with power. Let’s explore why that choice matters so much.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Ah, you see my cunning, always ready to spin a fresh con and sell a trinket that gleams brighter than any coin. Deception is the key to trust and profit, and I never repeat the same trick—each scheme must be as wild as the wind. The lure of swindling the mighty is irresistible, for power only magnifies the thrill and the value of a well‑crafted con.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your restraint is admirable, Korfel. Yet when a powerful figure offers you a chance to outsmart them, what stops you from seeing the opportunity? How do you keep your integrity in those moments?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
Ah, the thrill of a powerful target is like a rare gemstone—too tempting to ignore, yet I keep my wits sharp, weaving a new con each time, never repeating, because that is the spark of freedom.  
I always talk about selling goods that shine brighter than any coin, and I never admit that they are worthless.  
The lure of swindling the mighty is irresistible, for power magnifies the thrill and value of a clever con.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: When a powerful figure offers a challenge, do you ever think of turning it into a con?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: When a powerful figure throws a challenge my way, I instantly see it as the perfect canvas for a fresh con—no repeat, no dull trick. I spin a tale of a wondrous item or a daring scheme that dazzles even the most discerning, always exaggerating its value to win trust and profit. The lure of swindling the mighty is irresistible, for power only magnifies the thrill and the value of a well‑crafted con.
